ask jean luc....also ask her to send some recent

--- kellens@earthlink.net wrote:

-----Forwarded Message-----

From: Lisa Gassner Lisa.G@gmx.at
Sent: Jun 28, 2006 7:46 AM
To: kellens@earthlink.net
Subject: Lisa from Austria

Hey Jeffrey!
Hey Sarah!

I don't know if you remind me, I'm the girl from
Austria, Lisa (we met each other at the beach in
miami + New York)

How are you?

I only wanted to ask you, if you know a
photographer (+ make-up artist) in miami who would
take some pictures from me, because I 'm in Miami
from 27th july -9th August and I really need some
new pictures for my book ;-) ... I 'd like to make
some pictures at the beach/in the water... wearing a
bikni, or swimsuit ...
Please can you help me finding a good photographer?

thanks and have a nice day :-)
Lisa
